ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hypotheses" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hypothesis */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file from which the hypothesis is derived */,
  "hypothesis_num" TEXT /* Identifier for the hypothesis */,
  "hypothesis_text" TEXT /* The hypothesis statement */,
  "node1" TEXT /* First variable or factor being analyzed */,
  "node2" TEXT /* Second variable or factor being analyzed */,
  "hypothesis_pr" TEXT /* The original phrasing of the hypothesis */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the hypothesis was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the hypothesis (e.g., in review, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* The name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or context of the node */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the node (e.g., environmental, economic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis involved in the relationship */,
  "node1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first node in the relationship */,
  "node2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second node in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the nodes (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_relationships_node2_id FOREIGN KEY ("node2_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_relationships_node1_id FOREIGN KEY ("node1_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_relationships_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split entry */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis associated with the split */,
  "node1_split" TEXT /* Detailed description of the first node's split */,
  "node2_split" TEXT /* Detailed description of the second node's split */,
  "split_description" TEXT /* Description of the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_splits_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author entry */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis authored */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who authored the hypothesis */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in authoring the hypothesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_authors_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_authors_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis tested */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the hypothesis test (e.g., supported, not supported) */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the hypothesis test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_results_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the hypothesis */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypothesis_versions_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_industry" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry associated with the hypothesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypothesis_region" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the hypothesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id", "region_id")
)
